creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
The problems still exists in FreeBSD-14-current. Calling whatis with the a dot (".") as argument returns 48 hits, but only 24 contains a dot.


$ whatis .  | wc -l
      48

$ whatis . | egrep '\.' | wc -l
      24

On debian11 I get:
$ whatis .
.: nothing appropriate.


and on centos8
$ whatis .
. (1)                - bash built-in commands, see bash(1)
